heroTitle: Find the right psychologist in 3 simple steps

errors.requireTopicBeforeSearch: Please select at least one topic before searching psychologists.

network.offline: You are offline. Some actions may fail until your connection is restored.
network.online: Your connection is back. You can continue safely.

resume.restoredWithTime: Draft restored from local storage (last saved {{label}}).

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred while loading this page.

recording.title: Step 1 - Voice Note
recording.subheader: Record a voice note or upload an existing audio file
recording.description: The recorder handles permission denial, tab interruption, and re-record flows to keep state stable.
recording.uploadPolicy: Small files are handled instantly up to {{smallMb}} MB. Larger files are processed in the browser up to {{largeMb}} MB.
recording.interrupted: Recording was interrupted. Please review and record again if needed.
recording.notSavedUntilStopped: Recording is not saved until you press Stop.
recording.largeUploadInterruptedAfterRefresh: Large-file processing was interrupted by refresh. Please upload the file again to continue.
recording.noAudio: No audio yet. Record or upload a file to continue.

recorderPanel.idleHint: Tap the button to start recording or

consent.title: Before recording, confirm you agree to process this audio for topic suggestions.
consent.note: You can delete the audio at any time.

prompts.prompt1: What has felt most overwhelming for you this week?
prompts.prompt2: Describe a recent situation where stress felt hard to manage.
prompts.prompt3: What kind of support are you hoping to get from therapy?

tooltips.consentRequired: Enable consent before recording or uploading.
tooltips.rerecord: Discard current audio and record again.
tooltips.deleteAudio: Delete the current saved audio immediately.
tooltips.audioNeeded: You need an audio file first.

deleteDialog.title: Delete saved audio?
deleteDialog.description: This will remove the current audio and clear topic progress.

closeDialog.title: Close this recording?
closeDialog.description: This will close the completed recording and reset the current audio.

toast.invalidAudio: Please upload a valid audio file.
toast.tooLargeFile: Audio file is too large for instant mode. It will be processed in large file mode automatically.
toast.tooLargeForLongUpload: File too large. Maximum supported size is 1 GB.
toast.cleared: Previous audio cleared. You can record again.
toast.longUploadFailed: Large file processing failed. Please try again or use a smaller file.

topics.title: Step 2 - Topic Suggestions
topics.subheader: Analyze audio and select relevant topics
topics.description: Topics are generated by the provided
topics.audioMissing: Audio is missing. Please go back to Step 1 and record or upload audio.
topics.selectedCount: Select one or more topics ({{count}} selected)

tooltips.undo: Undo your most recent topic selection change.
tooltips.redo: Redo a reverted topic selection change.
tooltips.noUndoHistory: No previous topic change to undo.
tooltips.noRedoHistory: No reverted topic change to redo.
tooltips.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one topic to continue.

toast.noAudio: No audio found. Please record or upload audio first.
toast.analyzeFailed: Unable to process audio. Please try again.

psychologists.title: Step 3 - Psychologist Search
psychologists.error: Failed to load psychologists. Please verify the GraphQL endpoint and selected topics.
psychologists.emptyDescription: Try adjusting your selected topics or retrying the search.
psychologists.emptyDescriptionAdvanced: No providers match current filters. Try lowering filters or broadening selected topics.

compare.title: Compare psychologists
compare.description: Compare selected providers side-by-side before deciding.
compare.empty: No psychologists selected for compare yet.

toast.maxCompare: You can compare up to 3 psychologists.

tooltips.selectForCompare: Select at least one psychologist to compare.
tooltips.openCompare: Show compare panel for selected psychologists.
tooltips.addToCompare: Add this psychologist to compare list.
tooltips.removeFromCompare: Remove this psychologist from compare list.
tooltips.requestSession: Mock action to simulate booking intent.
